creator: nox@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I see you are using -m 512, did you increase kern.maxdsiz? (see the 
comments on MAXDSIZ in /sys/conf/NOTES.)  The default is 512 MB on i386 
and qemu needs memory for itself also so I'm not surprised you see 
problems if you didnt. (Tho I agree the failure mode is 
not nice, maybe I should add a note to pkg-message...)
